author: lOrm
content: Duplicate of #830 (already closed 2026-05-20 07:00). Same defect (Modifier::Debug / Preset::Debug serde collision + Display ambiguity), same location (src/modes/mod.rs:67-104), same mandated refactor. Verified fix in place at HEAD 80439851: src/modes/mod.rs:80,83,86 has #[serde(rename = "modifier-debug")] / modifier-methodical / modifier-director, and lines 125,128,131 mirror the preset-* renames. serde_roundtrip_all_presets and serde_roundtrip_all_modifiers pass. Closing as duplicate.
